findings.description: PDF email hyperlinks for DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov lost in HTML. The PDF shows these email addresses as clickable hyperlinks (blue/underlined as links), but the HTML renders them as plain text without <a href> wrapping.
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 shows 'DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov' as a hyperlink twice (in the application instructions and at the bottom under QUESTIONS). HTML first instance: 'Send resume and cover letter to DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov' (plain text, no <a>). HTML second instance: '<u>DEQInternships@ncdenr.gov</u>' (underlined text only, no <a href>).
